sourceTitle: University of Sydney's AI assessment policy: protecting integrity and empowering students
verificationNotes: Official University of Sydney news article signed by DVC Education Professor Joanne Wright and PVC Educational Innovation Professor Adam Bridgeman. Announces the Semester 1 2025 policy change defaulting to AI-allowed for non-exam assessments and the two-lane approach from Semester 2 2025. Confirms Microsoft Copilot partnership.
